top_signals.title: Taiwan's KMT leader set for US trip amid scrutiny of party's defense cuts
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Korea Boosts Bond-Market Vigil Via Daily Phone Calls, Group Chat
top_signals.summary: South Korea intensified monitoring of the government bond market through daily phone calls and a private messaging group with market participants, as authorities step up efforts to contain rising yields.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Deloitte and KPMG challenge PwC’s iron grip on FTSE 100 clients
top_signals.summary: For the first time in nearly eight years, three of the Big Four giants, Deloitte, KPMG and PwC, are locked in a dead heat for FTSE 100 client dominance. A boardroom reshuffle has loosened PwC’s iron grip on clients from London’s blue-chip index, forcing a historic three-way tie at the top of the FTSE 100 [...]
